channel.title: YouFibreGuide Blog
channel.description: Notes, updates, and tips from two-plus years of running YouFibre as the backbone of a home office and busy household.

item.title: Setting up OPNsense with YouFibre FTTP
item.description: YouFibre delivers on standard DHCP, so plugging in a custom router is straightforward — but there are a few things worth knowing about MTU, the ONT handoff, and getting your WAN interface configured cleanly.

item.title: Two years with YouFibre: what's changed, what hasn't
item.description: A quick update after hitting the two-year mark. Pricing has moved slightly, a couple of short outages, and a new package tier. Here's whether I'd still make the same choice today.

item.title: Adding a static IP to your YouFibre connection
item.description: If you're self-hosting services or running a VPN endpoint from home, a static IP makes life much simpler. YouFibre offer it as an add-on. Here's what it costs, how to request it, and how to configure it on OPNsense.
